summary: Extended the qd report validation gate so it reads roadmap/qd-export.json, requires completion and audit reports for every done node, and rejects report directories whose node id is absent from the roadmap export while allowing in-flight reports for real non-done nodes.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: The qd report validation command reads roadmap/qd-export.json.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: scripts/qd-reports-check.sh validates roadmap/qd-export.json before running coverage checks.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Every qd node with status done requires reports/qd/<node-id>/completion.json and reports/qd/<node-id>/audit.json.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: scripts/qd-reports-check.sh validate_done_node_report_coverage checks both files for every done node; just qd-reports-check passed.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Every report directory containing completion or audit JSON corresponds to a node id in the roadmap export.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: scripts/qd-reports-check.sh validate_report_directory_coverage rejects report dirs missing from roadmap/qd-export.json; just qd-reports-check passed.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: In-flight report directories remain allowed for claimed or review nodes before final qd merge.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: Only done nodes are required to have both reports; any report directory for a real roadmap node id remains allowed.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: The coverage check remains wired into just check through existing just qd-reports-check.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: justfile already runs just qd-reports-check from just check; nix develop -c just check passed.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Evidence records validation and qd reports.
No product runtime, capture, encode, transport, decode, render, presentation, cross-device, or latency claim.

realWorldValidation.evidence: Repository qd report coverage validation only; no product runtime behavior is claimed.
